description: This file defines a schema self-healing mechanism for a MySQL database. It includes helper functions to check for the existence of columns, indexes, and tables, and functions to add missing columns and indexes to specific tables ('persona_drafts' and 'persona_final') in a runtime-safe manner. The main exported function 'ensureMysqlSchemaCompatible' performs checks and applies updates if needed, ensuring the schema aligns with application expectations without causing errors during server startup.

methods.name: _mysqlHasColumn(tableName, columnName)
methods.description: Checks if a specific column exists in a given table by querying information_schema.columns.

methods.name: _mysqlHasIndex(tableName, indexName)
methods.description: Checks if a specific index exists on a table by querying information_schema.statistics.

methods.name: _mysqlHasTable(tableName)
methods.description: Checks if a table exists in the database by querying information_schema.tables.

methods.name: _ensurePersonaDraftsPersonaIdColumnMysql()
methods.description: Ensures the 'persona_id' column and related index exist in the 'persona_drafts' table, adding them if missing.

methods.name: _ensurePersonaFinalPersonaIdColumnMysql()
methods.description: Ensures the 'persona_id' column and related index exist in the 'persona_final' table, adding them if missing.

methods.name: ensureMysqlSchemaCompatible()
methods.description: Main function that performs runtime-safe schema checks and applies necessary modifications to align the database schema with application expectations.
